ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer resides */,
  "zip" TEXT /* ZIP code of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer registered */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points of the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  "referral_source" TEXT /* Source through which the customer learned about the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical address of the store */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the store */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the store is located */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the store manager */,
  "manager_email" TEXT /* Email of the store manager */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date when the store opened */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the store */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the store location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the store location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the order was placed */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., placed, shipped, delivered) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "shipping_city" TEXT /* City for the shipping address */,
  "shipping_zip" TEXT /* ZIP code for the shipping address */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was shipped */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was delivered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., shoes, apparel) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity available in stores */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the supplier of the product */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Stock level at which a reorder is needed */,
  "last_restock_date" TEXT /* Date of the last restock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order to which the item belongs */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product in the order */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax amount for the product in the order */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the product (e.g., pair, piece) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer providing feedback */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store related to the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when feedback was provided */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or suggestions from the customer */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., product, service) */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating (e.g., 1 to 5 stars) */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was responded to */,
  "response_comments" TEXT /* Response comments from the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the supplier */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the supplier is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* ZIP code of the supplier */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the supplier is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)
